name: Ayush Munot
now: Finishing MAEB · interviewing for new-grad ML roles · reading Bishop's Deep Learning

intro.headline: I build retrieval systems and the benchmarks that keep them honest.
paragraphs: I'm a final-year student at IIT Kharagpur, finishing a B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and an M.Tech in Financial Engineering, with a CSE minor and an AI micro-specialization. The actual work I care about lives in applied ML — retrieval, RAG, embeddings, computer vision, and the unglamorous engineering that makes any of it ship.

Most recently I've been interning at Fidelity Investments and Sourcegraph, and doing research with the AFAR Lab at Cambridge and IISc Bangalore. On the side I help maintain MTEB and I co-authored MAEB, a benchmark for audio embeddings that's currently under review.

highlights.label: Writing
highlights.value: MAEB and DiffusedDINO, both under review
